name: GET /api/properties - Public list of published properties
description: Public list endpoint behind the marketing site's properties grid. Always filters to status='published' — drafts/hold/sold rows never appear. Optional ?type=, ?location=, ?price_min_minor=, ?price_max_minor= refine the results; unsupported type values return 400.
skipReason: property-service runs on port 4012 (per .env MONOREPO PORT MAP); the projexlight test runner targets a single base URL (4010 = user-service). Re-enable once the API gateway/BFF lands or the runner gains per-route base-URL support.
